headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: (b) THE SUBCONTRACTOR SHALL PROTECT, INDEMNIFY, DEFEND AND SAVE HARMLESS CONTRACTOR FROM AND AGAINST ALL DAMAGES AND ALL COSTS AND EXPENSES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, ATTORNEYS' FEES, ARISING OUT OF ANY INFRINGEMENT OR CLAIM OF INFRINGEMENT ON ANY PATENT OR LICENSE IN THE USE OF ANY ARTICLES OR EQUIPMENT FURNISHED OR REQUIRED TO BE FURNISHED BY THE SUBCONTRACTOR UNDER THIS SUBCONTRACT.
